hero.title: Buy or sell private companies in Latin America
hero.subtitle: Akira helps founders explore liquidity and helps buyers access curated acquisition opportunities across Latin America.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Founders submit their company details. Buyers submit their acquisition criteria.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our team qualifies every submission to ensure quality and relevance.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Qualified buyers get access to vetted acquisition opportunities.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Akira facilitates relevant introductions between qualified parties.

sellers.title: For sellers
sellers.subtitle: Exploring a sale shouldn't be complicated. Akira gives you a confidential, structured way to connect with serious buyers.
sellers.benefit3: Cross-border reach across Latin America and beyond

buyers.title: For buyers
buyers.subtitle: Get access to acquisition opportunities you won't find on public marketplaces. Curated, cross-border, and LATAM-focused.

benefits.title: Why Akira
benefits.b1_desc: Deep focus on Latin American private companies across key sectors.
benefits.b2_desc: Every deal is reviewed and qualified before being shared with buyers.
benefits.b3_desc: Built for international transactions between LATAM and the US.
benefits.b4_desc: Designed for founders who want a simple, confidential process.

cta.title: Ready to explore?
cta.subtitle: Whether you're looking to sell or acquire, Akira is the simplest way to start.

sell.title: Sell your company
sell.subtitle: Tell us about your business. All information is kept confidential and only shared with qualified buyers with your consent.

fields.consent: I consent to Akira storing and processing this information to facilitate potential acquisition discussions.

placeholders.reason_for_selling: Why are you considering a sale?

sell.note: All submissions are confidential and reviewed manually.
sell.success: Your submission was received successfully. We will be in touch soon.

buyers.title: Access deals
buyers.subtitle: Tell us about your acquisition criteria. We'll match you with relevant opportunities from our curated pipeline.

fields.acquisition_interest: What kind of acquisitions interest you?
fields.consent: I consent to Akira storing and processing this information to facilitate deal access.

buyers.note: Tell us what you are looking for and we will share relevant opportunities.
buyers.success: Your submission was received successfully. We will be in touch soon.

deals.title: Current opportunities
deals.subtitle: Browse curated acquisition opportunities across Latin America. Request an introduction to learn more about any deal.
deals.empty: No deals available at the moment. Check back soon.

thank_you.title: Thank you
thank_you.subtitle: We've received your submission. Our team will review it and get back to you shortly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Akira ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.

**Information we collect:** We collect information you provide through our forms, including your name, email, company details, and financial information relevant to potential transactions.

**How we use it:** Your information is used solely to facilitate potential acquisition discussions between qualified parties. We do not sell your data.

**Data storage:** Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption and access controls.

**Confidentiality:** Company details submitted by sellers are only shared with qualified buyers and only with the seller's consent.

**Contact:** For privacy-related questions, reach out to us at privacy@akira.lat

Last updated: April 2026
